entry.title: New: Bill 61 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES; CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS, COUNTYWIDE, GOVERNMENT FACILITIES, BOND FUND, COUNTYWIDE DPW BASEYARD FACILITIES PROGRAM; AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS, COUNTYWIDE DPW BASEYARD FACILITIES PROGRAM" This bill proposes to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget to increase the appropriation under Capital Improvement Projects, Department of Public Works, Countywide, Government Facilities, Bond Fund, Countywide DPW Baseyard Facilities Program by $4,200,000.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
